fields.name: ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the notification entry.

fields.name: Recipient User ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the user who received the notification.

fields.name: Error Message
fields.tooltip: Specifies an error that relates to the notification entry.

fields.name: Created Date-Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date and time that the notification was created.

fields.name: Created By
fields.tooltip: Specifies the user who created the notification.
